sections.paragraph:
masc.-

(1) a sling. Arab مقْلاَعُ, 1Sa 17:40.

(2) a vail, Exo 27:9, seqq.; 35:17 Num 3:26. (Chald. id., Arab. قِلْعُ sail of a ship, IV. to sail, to navigate. Eth. ቀልዐ፡ the sail is taken in; but how this signification can be reconciled to the former (No. 1), I cannot say). 1Ki 6:34 for קְלָעִים apparently we ought to read, צְלָעִים leaves of a door, which is found in the former hemistich, and MS. Kennic. No. 150.
